title: Shachou to Sake to Hoshi - Hoofdstuk 1 - Baas en het Park
description:
Shachou to Sake to Hoshi - Hoofdstuk 1 - Baas en het Park [Baas, Drank en Sterren]

------------

Reina Izutsu (24) staat plots aan het roer van Izutsu Printing na het onverwachte overlijden van haar vader. Vastbesloten om zijn nalatenschap voort te zetten, zet ze zich keihard in — misschien wel té hard. Haar strenge houding zorgt voor spanningen binnen het bedrijf, iets waar Kenichi Ishizumi (37), afdelingshoofd en trouwe werknemer, zich zorgen over maakt.

Op een avond treft hij Reina dronken en gefrustreerd in het park. “Ik stop ermee, ik wil geen president meer zijn!” roept ze uit, zich niet eens bewust van zijn aanwezigheid als ondergeschikte. In dat kwetsbare moment ziet Ishizumi een andere kant van haar — en onder de sterren besluit hij haar vanaf dat moment onvoorwaardelijk te steunen.

title: [CenturyZeta] Blue Exorcist Original Drama CD 4 RHAPSODY IN BLUE (Ao no Exorcist)
description:
**[CenturyZeta] subs presents:**
An English translation of the fourth Ao no Exorcist Drama CD:
**Blue Exorcist Original Drama CD 4 RHAPSODY IN BLUE** | [vgmdb](https://vgmdb.net/album/73838)

**To note:**
-The original title of the Drama CD is in English. So that's why it's named Blue Exorcist and not Ao no Exorcist.
-This Drama CD was included with the tenth volume of the Ao no Exorcist BD & DVD.
-The art used in the background of the video comes from the cover of said volume.
-The original Drama CD was split into three tracks, so that's why there are three parts here as well.

I don't know the ideal way to turn a FLAC file into an MKV file, so if you try to turn off the audio track the video closes. But other than that, it works totally fine.
As always, any feedback is welcome. I stop seeding when I go to sleep so seeders are appreciated.
**I always include honourifics and use the proper Japanese name order.**
**Please use MPV.**

**Credits:**
The FLAC audio was taken from Moozzi2's upload of the BD torrent [here](https://nyaa.si/view/908971)
Translation and everything else by CenturyZeta.

**Roadmap:**
I'm planning on making translations for all the Ao no Exorcist audio dramas:

Blue Exorcist Original Drama CD 1 Father's Day Once More **(DONE)**
Blue Exorcist Original Drama CD 2 Top of the Ranking -Boys, be ambitious!- **(DONE)**
Blue Exorcist Original Drama CD 3 a little wish in the holiday **(DONE)**
Blue Exorcist Original Drama CD 4 RHAPSODY IN BLUE **(DONE)**
Gekijouban Ao no Exorcist Original Drama CD Souvenir in BLUE EXORCIST THE MOVIE ~Okumura Yukio Saiaku no Mikkakan~
Ao no Exorcist Kyouto Fujouou-hen Original Drama CD 1 Akuma to Hanami 
Ao no Exorcist Kyouto Fujouou-hen Original Drama CD 2 Memories of...
Ao no Exorcist Yuki no Hate-hen Original Drama CD Life Goes on
Ao no Exorcist Yuki no Hate-hen Original Drama CD Asylum nite ~Neuhaus to Mephisto Mimei no Mondou~
Ao no Exorcist Yosuga-hen Original Drama CD Rin in Wonderland

**There's one drama CDs however which hasn't been uploaded online yet:** 
Ao no Exorcist Drama CD Money, Money, Money | [vgmdb](https://vgmdb.net/album/96132)

title: [Kekkan] Kanpekiseijo - 09 (WebRip 1080p AV1 Multi-Subs Aliciä) / Kanpekisugite Kawaige ga Nai to Konyaku Haki sareta Seijo wa Ringoku ni Urareru
description:
![Magic Circle](https://i.imgur.com/ygp7q8W.png)

---

### Filtering and Encoding Details

slow.pics from episode 01: [https://slow.pics/c/7yAhaDeW](https://slow.pics/c/7yAhaDeW).

The most noticeable artefact throughout this anime is its strong ringing around the lines. We could not find the correct kernel for descaling. For scenes that have smaller descaling error, we use `vsscale.Rescale` and `vsdehalo.edge_cleaner` to filter the frames. For scenes that have larger descaling error, we use `vsdehalo.fine_dehalo` and `vsaa.based_aa` to filter the frames.
There are not many action scenes in this anime, but most of them have terrible-looking encoding artefacts in the source. To hopefully minimise the artefacts, specifically for action scenes, we use DPIR to deblock, followed by `vsdehalo.edge_cleaner` and a stronger gaussian-filtering aa to filter the frames.
This anime is characterised by its heavy film grain. We opt to keep as much grain as possible during the filtering process.

For encoding, we use Progression Boost Preset-Butteraugli-3Norm-INFNorm-Max to deliver a rather high quality encode. This is the Butteraugli 3Norm score of episode 01 with film grain removed compared to the filtered source:
| Metric | Mean | Standard Deviation | 95th Percentile | Worst Single Frame |
| :--: | :--: | :--: | :--: | :--: | :--: | :--: |
| **Butteraugli 3Norm** | **0.359** | 0.097 | 0.500 | 0.633 |
We use SVT-AV1-PSY v2.3.0-Q, and these are the key encoding parameters: `--preset [-1 ~ 0] --crf [6.25 ~ 30.00] --tune 3 --enable-tf 1 --kf-tf-strength 1 --tf-strength 2 --sharpness 0 --film-grain 7 --psy-rd 2.6 --spy-rd 0`.

Thanks to all the people creating the tools, plugins and vsfunc's that make this possible, and thanks to everyone in the community for teaching me and giving me advice.

You are welcome to join AV1 weeb edition at [https://discord.gg/83dRFDFDp7](https://discord.gg/83dRFDFDp7).

# Comet Lucifer (2015)
![IMAGE ALT TEXT HERE](https://vistapointe.net/images/comet-lucifer-wallpaper-2.jpg)


### Résumé
L'histoire se déroule sur l'exoplanète Gift dont le sol est riche en cristaux appelés Giftjium. Ces derniers assurent la prospérité de nombreuses villes minières, dont celle de Garden Indigo, où vit Sôgo Amagi, un orphelin passionné par les cristaux. Une passion transmise par sa mère qui était chercheuse. Un jour, alors qu'il est descendu dans la mine avec d'autres élèves de sa classe, il est bousculé par une émeute et se perd. C'est en cherchant à retrouver son chemin vers la surface qu'il rencontrera Felia, une étrange jeune fille qui semble vivre là.

title: [VCB-Studio] 赛马娘 Pretty Derby 新时代之门 / Uma Musume Pretty Derby - BEGINNING OF A NEW ERA / ウマ娘 プリティーダービー 新時代の扉 10-bit 1080p HEVC BDRip [MOVIE Fin]
description:
![BEGINNING_OF_A_NEW_ERA-post_800.webp](https://img.2222.moe/images/2025/05/30/BEGINNING_OF_A_NEW_ERA-post_800.webp)  
  
赛马娘 Pretty Derby 新时代之门 BDRip  
Uma Musume Pretty Derby - BEGINNING OF A NEW ERA BDRip  
ウマ娘 プリティーダービー 新時代の扉 BDRip  
  
外挂 5.1 音轨、无障碍音轨和评论音轨，内封原盘日文字幕。  
MKA contains FLAC 5.1 + Audio Guide + Commentary. Embedded official JPN PGS.  
  
本番由 **组员提名**，应要求制作。感谢他们为 VCB-Studio 发展做出的无私奉献。  
This project was **nominated by our members** and produced upon request. Thanks to them for their selfless dedication to the development of VCB-Studio.  
  
原盘画质中等，全片基本都是 FHD 级别的制作。我们怀疑原生分辨率可能远超 1080p，成品是由更高分辨率降采样得到的，然而降采样算法较为糟糕，产生了大量的锯齿和振铃。我们采用强力的抗锯齿和去振铃手段，然后辅以补偿性锐化。原盘线条有强度较高的 RGB shift 色散特效，在部分场景的色度平面上造成了严重的色度锯齿问题。我们采用神经网络算法配合传统手段进行处理，由于处理在 RGB 下进行，而原盘部分场景有极端鲜艳的色彩和精细的色度细节，转回常见的 YUV420 格式后效果不佳，因此我们选择使用 YUV444 格式来保证色度的修复效果。原盘平面则没有太大问题，我们采用了轻度的抗色带处理，进行了常规的自适应降噪。  
The image quality of the source is moderate. The entire movie appears to be an FHD production. We suspect the native resolution may significantly exceed 1080p, and the finished product was downsampled from a higher-resolution source; however, the downsampling algorithm was subpar, resulting in noticeable aliasing and ringing artifacts. We use intense anti-aliasing and de-ringing, followed by contra-sharpening. The source lines also featured strong RGB shift dispersion effects, which caused severe chroma aliasing issues in the chroma planes of some scenes. We combined neural network-based processing with traditional methods. Since processing was done in the RGB color space to handle the chroma distortions properly, and the source contains extremely vibrant colors and intricate chroma detail in some scenes, converting back to the common YUV420 format proved ineffective. Therefore, we opted for YUV444 output to preserve the fidelity of chroma restoration. Flat areas were relatively clean, requiring only mild de-banding and standard adaptive denoising.  
  
发布：祝大家六一快乐(｀・ω・´)

title: [VCB-Studio] 赛马娘 Pretty Derby 巅峰之路 / Uma Musume Pretty Derby - ROAD TO THE TOP / ウマ娘 プリティーダービー ROAD TO THE TOP 10-bit 1080p HEVC BDRip [MOVIE Fin]
description:
![118987608_p0_800.webp](https://img.2222.moe/images/2025/05/30/118987608_p0_800.webp)  
  
赛马娘 Pretty Derby 巅峰之路 BDRip  
Uma Musume Pretty Derby - ROAD TO THE TOP BDRip  
ウマ娘 プリティーダービー ROAD TO THE TOP BDRip  
  
外挂 5.1 音轨和评论音轨，内封原盘日文字幕。  
MKA contains FLAC 5.1 and commentary track. Embedded official JPN PGS.  
  
原盘画质整体较好，大部分场景原生分辨率在 878.0p 左右波动，极少部分场景原生分辨率为 810.0p。原盘线条有一些轻微的锯齿和晕轮问题，我们采用自适应逆向拉伸重构配合常规手段去除。原盘平面带有一层较强的噪点，基本没有色带问题，不过部分场景存在欠码导致的色块和烂噪。我们采用较强的去色块处理，对烂动噪进行了较大的削弱，然后进行亮度自适应降噪。  
The source quality is generally good, with most scenes having a native resolution around 878.0p, and a small number of scenes at 810p. The source lines exhibited minor aliasing and haloing, which were corrected through adaptive descaling and reconstruction, along with conventional means. The flat area of the source exhibits a noticeable amount of noise and is largely free of color banding. However, some scenes suffer from blocking and dct noise due to insufficient bitrate. To address this, we applied more intensive de-blocking and reduced badly dynamic noise, and then luma-adaptive denoising.  
  
注：BD 只收录了4集合在一起的剧场剪辑版，没有收录分集版。剧场剪辑版相比分集版，在最后的 Winning Live 前有一段新镜头。  
Remark: The BD only contains the Gekijouban Cut of all 4 episodes, not the split version. The gekijouban cut has a new scene before the final Winning Live compared to the split version.  
  
发布：祝大家六一快乐(｡･ω･｡)

title: [DarkWispers-Orphan-LonelyChaser] Heart Cocktail Colorful - 11 - 15 [1080p]
description:
DarkWispers, Orphan, and LonelyChaser present the last set of five episodes, all set in the fall and winter, of *Heart Cocktail Colorful*, the latest release in Watase Seizou’s long-running media franchise. These episodes are much like previous installments of the *Heart Cocktail* series: short, tightly-focused stories of romance found, lost, or regained. If they seem a bit more optimistic than the summer set, that’s only an impression. See [this blog entry](https://collectr.blogspot.com/2025/05/heart-cocktail-colorful-winter-stories.html) for more details.

title: [Blasphemboys] Grey: Digital Target / GREY デジタル・ターゲット Movie (1986) [LDrip AVC FLAC]
description:
![](https://i.imgur.com/f642dDD.png)

RAW used is WOWmd's own Domesday capture and encode of an LD. This show was previously only available via DVD rips (which were all PAL DVDs since y'know no Japanese one exists).
Subs are based on the [APC release](https://nyaa.si/view/396333), which was in turn based on the 2007 ILA translation. 
For this release, Perevodildo translation-checked and typeset, TougeWolf quality-checked. 

This torrent includes the movie itself and the bonus included on the LD—"Special Presents." The bonus is basically a trailer for the movie, plus a short interview with the manga creator, in which he confesses creating it on a spur without any bigger idea, simply because "he wanted to draw SF," and it really shows. As usual, I've done an extremely lazy hackjob of a translation for that bonus, with no QC. 
I also included the official (VHS only, by Viz, recorded at Ocean) English dub for those of you with no common decency. I synced it very sloppily though, because there's only so much effort I can put into including dubs.

[AniDB](https://anidb.net/perl-bin/animedb.pl?show=anime&aid=1515) | [Subs only](https://github.com/Perevodildo/Perevodildo-softsubs/tree/main/Grey%20Digital%20Target)

title: [CatSub] Cocoon: Records d’un estiu de noies (subtítols en català)
description:
**SUBTÍTOLS EN CATALÀ! - CATALAN SUBTITLES!**

I heus aquí el plat gros del dia: el film Cocoon: Records d’un estiu de noies!

La San i la Mayu són dues estudiants d’institut que viuen a Okinawa durant els últims mesos de la Guerra del Pacífic. Aquestes dues amigues, juntament amb les seves companyes d’institut, es veuen immerses en la guerra i han de dedicar-se a fer d’infermeres i tenir cura dels soldats ferits. Quan els acaben ordenant que morin pel seu país, les membres restants del grup decideixen fugir, però s’hauran d’enfrontar al dur entorn d’un paradís tropical que ha esdevingut un horrible camp de batalla.

Estem convençuts que aquesta obra, animada en part per antics membres de l’Studio Ghibli, no us deixarà indiferents. I si voleu una mica més de context addicional, mireu el curt «Himeyuri» que hem penjat fa una estona!

Més informació: https://www.catsub.net/noticia/611-cocoon-records-d-un-estiu-de-noies

Al nostre lloc web hi trobaràs altres mètodes de baixada, incloent-hi visualització en streaming i baixada directa!

**FOR NON-CATALAN SPEAKING USERS:**

*This file has hardcoded subtitles in Catalan language. Subtitles are not optional and no other languages are included.*

title: [CatSub] Himeyuri (subtítols en català)
description:
**SUBTÍTOLS EN CATALÀ! - CATALAN SUBTITLES!**

I aquí tenim el segon llançament d’avui: Himeyuri.

Es tracta d’un curt que narra la història real d’un grup d’estudiants que van servir com a infermeres durant la batalla d’Okinawa, en l’època de la Segona Guerra Mundial. Va ser produït per la Fundació del Memorial de la Pau de Himeyuri amb l’objectiu d’explicar als infants les experiències de moltes d’aquelles noies que hi van perdre la vida.

Si bé aquest curt no té pràcticament animació i és més un documental històric que no pas un film, hem volgut subtitular-lo com a extra per al tercer llançament d’avui, que també narra una versió d’aquesta història. Sabreu quin film és d’aquí a una estona.

Més informació: https://www.catsub.net/noticia/610-himeyuri

##### All hope is not lost! If you can wait for the superior [Pizza] release, please do! But as a proud member of the sneedmuxing community, the grind never stops—even when aliens invade, lightning bolts fly, and school life is routinely upended by interstellar chaos!

### **Lum-chan daisuki!!!** ❣️

#### **Ladies, gentlemen, and extraterrestrial love interests—we interrupt your regularly scheduled earthbound programming to bring you something truly zapped with nostalgic brilliance! What you’re looking at is a dazzling, high-voltage remake of one of anime’s most electrifying classics: Urusei Yatsura! 🌟👽**

#### **Straight from the *c*osmic *c*onbini shelves to your drive, this is untouched store at its finest—pristine and glowing like Lum’s hair under a harvest moon! The A/V quality sparkles brighter than a jealous oni-girl’s glare, and it’s lovingly paired with Pizza’s wonderfully wacky subs (plus honorifics, additional QC/consistency fixes, and missing songs inserted)—just the way the gods of Tomobiki High intended.**

#### **So, whether you're here for the romcom, the slapstick, the wild sci-fi detours, or just to bask in the glow of Lum-sama’s tsundere thunderbolts—this release almost has it all (gomen, dual-audio next time)!**

#### **Now grab your tiger-striped bikini, dodge a few love confessions, and dive in (with [mpv](https://mpv.io/), of course)—because with this release, you're not just watching Urusei Yatsura. You're living it. ⚡💘**
___
*The [washed] Archival Project (WAP) is meant for the plebs, the ordinary joes, and the starving peasants on Nyaa who ~~are too lazy to grind for~~will never sniff access to a PT, like me. This project was inspired by the numerous entries on the Dex™ where the “Best” release is locked behind a PT, and seeks to make these muxes not only accessible, but better. Unfortunately, my lack of AB/U2 access limits the range of content I can upload, so if you enjoy my content, **please** consider donating an invite or two for charity purposes. [Join my Discord](https://discord.gg/uZtsXkZfBJ) for more exciting content and updates.*

## Series Overview
> Fan Lingxiao, a spiritual pet master with exceptional talents, was plotted against during the Level-A sect promotion competition and was devoured by Kun, his own spiritual pet. When he opened his eyes again, he found himself reincarnated into a young man named “Liu Fengmang” and was imprisoned in the White Mansion’s dungeon. Meanwhile, his own sect, Lingxiao Pavilion, was in a perilous state. To uncover the truth of being devoured by Kun and revitalize his sect, Fan Lingxiao, accompanied by his existing spiritual pets, embarked on a brand-new adventure journey with Gu Ling, Cheng Xi, and Yue Tong.

***

**Год выхода:** 2025
**Жанр:** приключения, фэнтези
**Тип:** TV
**Продолжительность:** 12 эп. по ~ 00:25:00
**Количество серий:** 09 из 12
**Дата выпуска:** c 03.04.2025
**Производство:** Япония, студия [Makaria](http://www.world-art.ru/company.php?id=541)
**Снято по ранобэ:** [Isshun de Chiryou Shiteita no ni Yakudatazu to Tsuihou Sareta Tensai Chiyushi, Yami Healer to Shite Tanoshiku Ikiru](http://www.world-art.ru/animation/manga.php?id=6263)
**Автор оригинала:** [Хисикава Сакаку](http://www.world-art.ru/people.php?id=1047877)
**Ссылки:** [World-Art](http://www.world-art.ru/animation/animation.php?id=12042), [ANN](https://www.animenewsnetwork.com/encyclopedia/anime.php?id=32386), [AniDB](https://anidb.net/anime/18528), [MyAnimeList](https://myanimelist.net/anime/58359)[hr]

**Перевод  #1:** Профессиональный (закадровый) | [Dream Cast](https://vk.com/jamfans/)
**Перевод  #2:** Профессиональный (закадровый) | [AniLibria.TV](https://anilibria.tv/)

**Субтитры:** Русские надписи, русские (софтсаб) | Multi-8 | Crunchyroll

**Описание:**
Зенос родился в трущобах и не имел никаких перспектив, пока не встретился с целителем. Встреча произвела на юношу такое впечатление, что он посвятил всего себя учёбе, в надежде тоже освоить это ремесло. Впервые Зеносу выпадает шанс, когда искатели приключений приглашают его в своей отряд. Он был так счастлив, что не обращал внимание на мелочи, вроде хренового отношения со стороны сопартийцев и отказа признавать его заслуги и полезность. Увы, через некоторое время это выливается в позорное изгнание из отряда. Зенос снова оказывается на дне жизни, но решает использовать свои с таким трудом приобретённые навыки иным способом: он открывает подпольную клинику и внезапно становится невероятно успешным. Слухи о превосходном целителе, творящем чудеса в городском подполье достигают даже королевского дворца…

**Эпизоды:**
01. Соразмерная плата
02. Подпольный хилер в заброшенном районе
03. Борьба за власть
04. Праведный герой
05. Своё место
06. Конец приключения
07. Особое обслуживание
08. Королевская больница
09. Пробраться в группу
10. Просьба аристократки
11. Обычный целитель
12. ***

у Dream Cast: Озвучивание: Dreamy Sleep, Just_Vlad, Libertina, Orru, Sergei Vasya (правильный перевод)
у AniLibria.TV: Озвучивание: Cleo-chan, Lobanow, SlivciS

description:
![yande.re-531956-bokutachi_wa_benkyou_ga_dekinai-furuhashi_fumino-megane-ogata_rizu-pantyhose-seifuku-sweater-tagme-takemoto_uruka-yuiga_nariyuki.jpg](http://img.2222.moe/images/2022/06/08/yande.re-531956-bokutachi_wa_benkyou_ga_dekinai-furuhashi_fumino-megane-ogata_rizu-pantyhose-seifuku-sweater-tagme-takemoto_uruka-yuiga_nariyuki.jpg)  
  
我们无法一起学习 / Bokutachi wa Benkyou ga Dekinai / ぼくたちは勉強ができない S1 + S2 + OVAs BDRip Reseed v2  
  
部分剧集内封评论音轨。  
Certain episodes contain commentary tracks.  
  
这个项目与 **喵萌奶茶屋** 合作，感谢他们精心制作的字幕。  
This project is in collaboration with **Nekomoe kissaten**. Thanks to them for elaborating Chinese subtitles.  
  
学不来原盘主要问题集中在线条上，平面的噪点也有被原盘编码摧残过的痕迹，部分场景显得十分难看。处理上主要针对平面噪点进行修复，对画面进行基于原生分辨率的重新缩放，并进一步实施抗锯齿和锐化。  
The source suffered from its BD encoding, which mainly destroyed the lines and crushed the noise in the flat area, making some scenes very dirty. The processing is focused on fixing the noise in the flat area. We rescaled the image based on the native resolution. Then AA and sharpening.  
  

* * *

重发修正：  
1\. 修正第二季第六话字幕；  
2\. 删除字体包内多余字体；  
3\. 新增收录第二季 ED Hi-res 版本；  
4\. 按照现行规范整理专辑。  
  
Reseed comment:  
1\. Fix subtitle for episode 6 of season 2;  
2\. Remove extra fonts in the font pack;  
3\. Add the Hi-res version of the second season ED;  
4\. Reorganize the album according to the current standards.  
  

* * *

CD: {abc831203, kannagiumine, 甜不氵娜娜, 合购区}@TSDM, jsum@U2  
  

* * *

本次发布来自 VCB-Studio 旧作重发计划。我们会不定期重发过去发布过的合集，或为补充做种，或为修正制作错漏，或为整合系列合集。

title: [Pizza] Anne Shirley (2025) - 08 [WEB 1080p HEVC AAC] | Akage no Anne (2025) - S01E08 | Anne of Green Gables (2025) - 08
description:
PP: [custommasked aa](https://slow.pics/c/cFKUPbit), dehalo, denoise, deband, regrain
Audio and subs are modified Crunchyroll
[Source-Encode Comparison](https://slow.pics/c/eVroIZhU)

---

Ended up taking longer after all, since this episode required the more revisions for the subtitles than any other so far. Next episode likely on Tuesday, since I am away until Sunday evening.


**Should I watch this adaptation, or should I watch the 1979 one instead?**
This new adaptation makes no attempt at replacing the previous anime adaptation. Whereas Takahata's interpretation was very faithful to the source material, this adaptation cuts a lot of content in order to streamline the narrative and up the pace, and will likely cover much more content (the first episode covers five episodes worth of content in the 1979 adaptation). The previous adaptation has a much more restrained storyboard and presentation and focuses on preserving the brilliance of the source's writing; this new adaptation has a much flashier storyboard and colours, and far more expressive character animation. Takahata's take on the work placed much more importance on letting each scene linger, resulting in storytelling that is more affecting, subtle, yet grave, and its designs are stripped of the common shoujo flair of the time. This adaptation has a much lighter tone, is rewritten to be more humorous and fun, but foregoes much of the detail in the source which make up its brilliance in favour of a more lighthearted and immediate way of storytelling. 

They are fundamentally different approaches. Fans of the previous adaptation may find some of these changes disagreeable (I know I do), but they are purposeful. And I think that is for the best. There already exists a meticulous and faithful adaptation of the source material, directed by one of the all-time greats, so trying to do the same thing again would be pointless. Either way, both approaches are great. I highly recommend you **watch both.**

---

Encode, QC, "Edit": Moelancholy
Styling, Timing, Typesetting: Nyarthur
Song Translation: jymmy
